comment:
8:30pm by headlamp lantern sans pad other than a couple empty backpacks and a thick fleece. sit start in the low lh hueco & rh fin. low left foot until gaston bump to high rail made the diff, r heel hook def helped. burly top out for sure, with a spooky "dont fall or you might break your back and die" desperation. maybe not smart but def gratifying.

Not sure what to think about Moab/BB grades vs Front Range grades vs Gym grades. Gym grades def seem to be inflating the scene. Didn't seem that much harder than Nobody Here Gets Out Alive, but my memory ain't what it used to be.
